title: Property Consultant - My Home Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - My Home Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
My Home Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
